license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.j6fcrbn
title: Recipe for sugar-agar food source for drosophila
author: Katy M Monteith

steps_raw.instruction: Bring 1 litre of triple distilled H₂O to boil in pan
Add 20g of agar and 84g of light brown soft sugar and stir continuously for 5 minutes while mixture boils rapidly
Allow mixture to cool to around 70°C and then stir in 7ml of tegosept anti-fungal solution (dissolve Methyl-4- hydroxybenzoate in 95% Ethanol at 150g/L)
